questions.question: DBMS stands for:
questions.explanation: Page 494: DBMS: It stands for Database Management System. It is a software package to manage database.

questions.explanation: Page 494: DHTML: It stands for Dynamic Hyper Text Markup Language. Used to create dynamic content on web pages.

questions.explanation: Page 494: Internet Society: It was formed in 1992 to promote the use of Internet.

questions.question: A Hacker is a person who breaks into a computer system to:

options.B: Get access to the information stored there

questions.explanation: Page 494: Hacker: A person who breaks into a computer system to get access to the information stored there.

questions.explanation: Page 494: GML: It stands for General Mark-up Language.

questions.question: Modem is a device to connect different computer systems to the internet using:

options.B: The way the browser displays text in a Web Page
